Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Arch Insurance To Respond To Pltf'S First Request For Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Patricia Anne Meacher, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Kelly Construction, Inc.
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Kelly Construction, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Arch Insurance To Respond To Plaintiff's First Request For Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Arch Insurance is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's First Request For Documents and to produce responsive documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied as there is no declaration supporting the request. [See C.C.P. Section 2023.040.] Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Mitchell Engineering To Further Respond To Pltf'S Discovery Requests And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Patricia Anne Meacher, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Kelly Construction, Inc.
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Kelly Construction, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Mitchell Engineering To Further Respond To Plaintiff's Discovery Requests is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Mitchell Engineering is ordered to produce documents responsive to Request For Production No. 1, and to respond further to Form Interrogatories 9.1, 9.2, 15.1, and 50.1 within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant Mitchell Engineering's failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Mitchell Engineering in the amount of $1,050, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
